## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] New tests cover the changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Changelog entry added (if applicable)
